message:
fix(harness): suppress unused variable warning, remove unused import, fix unnecessary integer cast

- cost_surface.rs: prefix unused report binding with _ (dead_code lint)
- doctor_cost_profile_e2e.rs: remove unused CostReport import
- editor_perf.rs: remove 2 unnecessary `as usize` casts on
  cursor.line (already usize after recent type change)
